hero.heading: Launch your product on a foundation that already works
hero.subheading: House Starter is the template every app is born from — secure sign-in, billing, transactional email, and a responsive, accessible design system, ready on day one.

features.title: Secure by default
features.description: Password sign-in, session handling, rate limiting, and per-tenant data isolation are built in and tested — not bolted on later.

features.title: Ready to charge
features.description: Subscriptions, checkout, and a paid-access gate ship in the template, so turning on billing is configuration, not construction.

features.title: Accessible everywhere
features.description: Every screen is checked against WCAG 2.2 AA and renders cleanly from a 320px phone to a widescreen desktop.

cta.heading: Ready to build?
cta.subheading: Create your account and start with the hard parts already solved.
cta.label: Create your account

footer.tagline: House Starter — the foundation every app is built on.
